---
title: "Reverse Engineering the BioNTech/Pfizer Vaccine"
description: "Bert Hubert's reverse engineering of the BioNTech/Pfizer SARS-CoV-2 vaccine — magic bytes, antiviral detection bypass, code optimization."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-12-26"
categories: [biomedical, science, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Reverse engineering Pfizer vaccine. Image from [Bert Hubert](https://berthub.eu/articles/posts/reverse-engineering-source-code-of-the-biontech-pfizer-vaccine/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Fascinating read about how a modern mRNA vaccine works - turns out it's not very different from the olden days when people manually examined disassembled code (or even just binary) and tried to hack it:

* Life's "magic bytes" (GA).
* Bypassing Life's antiviral detection.
* Code optimization.
* Finding the code to prop up the spike protein without an actual virus body.
* Inflating the "counter" to prolong the usefulness of mRNA.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_reverse-engineering-the-source-code-of-the-activity-6748789021054521344-cj8u).*
